## Description

A clear and concise description of the problem.

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| Integration version | e.g. 0.9.0 |
| Home Assistant version | e.g. 2024.5.0 |
| Installation method | HACS / Manual |

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Affected Station(s)

If relevant, provide the station name and/or CHMI station ID (e.g. `0-203-1-039000`).

## Logs

Please include relevant logs from **Settings → System → Logs**, filtered by `chmi_hydrology`.

```
paste logs here
```

## Additional Context

Any other information that might be helpful (screenshots, dashboard config, etc.).
